last_assistant_message:
Back up ΓÇö app running, backend listening on :4777.

Spoken:
The app is running again. Heads up though: when I launch it, it's tied to my session, so it gets shut down whenever my session resets, which is what just happened. If you launch it yourself with your ah command in your own terminal, it'll keep running independently of me and won't die like this. For now it's back, so you can keep testing the highlight setting and notifications.

==========

Displayed:
Relaunched (`by6slncm8`) ΓÇö backend on :4777, app window up, new code (highlight + notify settings).

Tip to avoid this recurring: launch via **`ah run` in your own terminal** rather than relying on me. Apps I start are children of my agent session, so they're torn down when the session resets (that's what stopped `bqmb8y8oa`). Your own terminal's process is independent and survives.

Ready to test: Settings ΓåÆ **Highlight spoken text** (warning appears) ΓåÆ play a long reply; toggle off ΓåÆ seek bar still scrubs. Plus notifications + the rest whenever.

background_tasks.description: Relaunch desktop app after session teardown
